title: Gisborne Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Gisborne and East Cape, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance from $4.50/day, for a budget of $120-200/day for a family of 4
intro: Planning a family holiday in Gisborne and East Cape can be affordable with the right deals and discounts. The region offers a range of activities, including surf lessons, scenic drives, and visits to historic sites, suitable for all ages. With a budget of $120-200/day for a family of four, you can experience the best of Gisborne and East Cape.

sections.heading: Current Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Gisborne and East Cape offer a range of activities and experiences that can be booked at discounted prices. Bookme.co.nz is currently offering up to 40% off activities in Rotorua, Queenstown, Bay of Islands, and Auckland, which can be a great way to save on your family holiday. Additionally, Discover Cars is offering family campervans from $89/day, which can be a cost-effective way to explore the region.

Booking.com is also offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings, providing flexibility and peace of mind when planning your trip. Cover-More travel insurance is available from $4.50/day, which can provide comprehensive protection for your family.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Gisborne and East Cape offer a range of activities that are great value for families. The East Cape Lighthouse, Tolaga Bay Wharf, and Wainui Beach surf lessons are all highly recommended and can be booked at discounted prices with Bookme.co.nz. The Rere Rockslide is a free activity that is perfect for kids, and the East Cape road drive offers stunning scenery and historic sites to explore.

The Eastwoodhill Arboretum is another great option, with a large collection of northern hemisphere trees and a peaceful atmosphere. Te Kuri a Paoa (Young Nick's Head) is a historic site that is worth visiting, and the scenic drive to get there is stunning.
list: Te Kuri a Paoa (Young Nick's Head)

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in Gisborne and East Cape, consider the following money-saving tips. Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to secure the best prices. Secondly, look for package deals that include multiple activities or experiences.

Thirdly, consider visiting during the off-season (April-May or September-October) when prices are lower. Fourthly, pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out for every meal. Fifthly, take advantage of free activities such as the Rere Rockslide and East Cape road drive. Lastly, book your campervan or accommodation for a minimum of 5 nights to get the best daily rate.
list: Book in advance to secure best prices
Book campervan or accommodation for 5+ nights

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your family holiday in Gisborne and East Cape, it's essential to book in advance. For activities and accommodation, book at least 2-3 months in advance to secure the best prices. For campervan hire, book at least 6 months in advance to get the best daily rate.

Keep an eye on the Bookme.co.nz website for last-minute deals and discounts, and be flexible with your travel dates to get the best prices. Additionally, consider booking during the off-season when prices are lower.
